mnemonics: Crossing High Scores You Always Question
Haunted Inspectors Seeking Weird Answers Naturally
keyPoints: The Chi-square distribution is used to test whether observed frequencies in categorical data are consistent with a known distribution.
It is used when we want to determine if there is a significant difference between the observed frequencies and the expected frequencies under a null hypothesis.
The test statistic is calculated as the sum of the squared differences between observed and expected frequencies divided by the expected frequency for each category.
